message.content:
@startuml
package domain
  interface INodeVisitor
    visit(node: Probe)
    visit(node: Input)
    visit(node: AndGate)
    visit(node: NOrGate)
    visit(node: NAndGate)
    visit(node: OrGate)
    visit(node: XOrGate)
    visit(node: XOrGate)
    visit(node: NotGate)
    visit(node: Circuit)

  class Circuit
    +Circuit()
    +addNode(node: Node)
    +addInput(node: Input)
    +addProbe(node: Probe)
    +getNodes(): Set<Node>
    +getInputs(): Set<Input>
    +getInput(name: String)
    +getProbes(): Set<Probe>
    +getProbe(name: String)
    +simulate()
    +addSimulationListener(simulationListener: SimulationListener)
    +addSimulationListeners(simulationListeners: Collection<SimulationListener>)

  class Node
    +value: boolean
    +name: String
    +Node(name: String)
    +getValue(): boolean
    +getName(): String
    +addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
    +addSimulationListener(simulationListener: SimulationListener)
    +notifyStartCalculation(calculatedValue: boolean)
    +calculate(): boolean
    +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)

  class NodeComposite
    +parents: List<Node>
    +NodeComposite(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
    +add(parent: Node)
    +removeParent: Node
    +getParents(): List<Node>
    +calculated(): boolean

  class Input
    +Input(value: boolean, name: String)
    +setValue(value: boolean)
    +calculate(): boolean
    +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    +addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)

    +Probe(name: String)
    +calculate(): boolean
    +accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    +addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
